about.title: Who I am
about.p1: My background is in office administration and CNC machining — organization and technical precision still shape the way I work today: structured, clean, reliable.
about.p2: Today I build frontends with Angular and TypeScript. My focus: clear UI logic, maintainable components, and clean implementation in a team environment.

3.text: Junior Frontend Developer — ready to take responsibility in a team and develop features cleanly.

about.lead: I bring structure and precision into frontend teams — with a clear focus on clean implementation.

bullets.location: Based in Aachen — open to hybrid or remote work.

academyImpact.title: A turning point with impact
academyImpact.p1: In 2023, I had to leave my job as a CNC machinist for health reasons — and I consistently made the transition into software development.
academyImpact.p2: At Developer Akademie, I worked on hands-on projects and built my own tool, which I personally presented on 22.02.2026 at Forschungszentrum Jülich to Prof. Dr. Dr. Thomas Lippert.
academyImpact.p3: For me, that proves one thing: I can ramp up quickly, deliver, and present technical results professionally.
academyImpact.p4: I am very grateful to Developer Akademie for that.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: Are you looking for a Junior Frontend Developer (Angular/TypeScript) who works in a structured way and delivers clean solutions? Then I’d be glad to hear from you.

hint.title: Short & direct
